blurb: Law-firm AI/regulatory practice. Launch coverage uses first-party EU AI Act analysis.

publications.title: The Commission's Draft High-Risk AI Guidelines under the EU AI Act: A First Read
publications.summary: Bird & Bird analyses the European Commission’s draft high-risk AI guidelines under the EU AI Act, including the threshold question of what qualifies as an AI system and how high-risk obligations are expected to operate.
